chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA No.D-927 0[ 2015_ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON'BLE JUDGE OF HEARING For orders on oflice objectiun as Flag 2, For orders on M.A,No.4134/20I5 For Katcha Peshi 12.201G.ل0 None is present for the petitioner It appears that this Was filed 110820I5 and thereafter the petitioner has not pursued his matter diligently, which shows that the petitioner has lost his interest in the petition, therefore, same disinissed for non prosucution with lisied application سە Judge J٧٥g٤ petition ulong
